title: Sandwīp Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sandwīp with a Z-Score of +3.20. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sandwīp has reached a critical level, with temperatures significantly above average. 
 The high temperature and humidity, at 85%, are causing severe discomfort to the residents. 
 The situation is further exacerbated by the low wind speed of 9.5 km/h, which is unable to provide relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
